iterations.theme: From Despair to Divine Calling: The Genesis of a Cross-Country Pilgrimage
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the speaker's profound personal spiritual journey, from youthful questioning and despair to a transformative encounter with Jesus, leading to a clear call to evangelization and the daunting decision to undertake the cross-country walk, culminating in the initial overwhelming challenges and a divine revelation on how to proceed.

chapters.topic: Introduction and God as a Good Father
Early Catholic Upbringing and Questioning Faith
Misunderstanding Freedom and Descent into Despair
The Darkest Moment and a Divine Encounter
Vision of Jesus on the Cross and Redefining Faith
Surrender and the Fruits of a Transformed Life
Jesus as a Leader and the Journey of Transformation
Encountering Poverty in South America
A Personal Mission: Helping Others Find God
The Bishops' Pastoral Letter and the Call to Evangelize
The Idea of Carrying a Cross Across America
Seeking Counsel and Bishops' Approval
Parents' Reaction and the Start of the Walk
Initial Struggles and the 'Left Foot, Right Foot' Revelation

iterations.theme: Miracles on the Road: Healing Hearts and Spreading the Message of Hope
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration focuses entirely on the actual cross-country pilgrimage, detailing significant encounters and miraculous transformations experienced along the way, from divine provision in the desert to profound spiritual healings of individuals, culminating in the overarching message of God's transformative power and the call to bring Jesus into others' lives.

chapters.topic: The 'Walk of Death' and Unexpected Companions
Divine Provision and Learning to Trust God for All
Encountering a Father's Hatred for the Cross
A Shared Breakfast and a Father's Grief
Connecting with God the Father and Emotional Release
The Father's Transformation and Return to His 'Own Cross'
The Story of the 'City Drunk' and Past Trauma
Mystical Encounter: Jesus in the 'Doghouse'
The Drunk's Radical Transformation and Return to Faith
Conclusion: God's Limitless Transformative Power and the Call to Carry the Cross
